case_title: MAHMOUD LARIZADEH VS. THOMAS SESTAK M. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LARIZADEH, MAHMOUD AS TO DEFENDANT SESTAK, THOMAS M. STANDARD ROOFING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARIZADEH, MAHMOUD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SESTAK, THOMAS M. STANDARD ROOFING THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARE BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
